commit.subject: LU-13759 tests: stop running sanity-dom test 20
commit.message:
LU-13759 tests: stop running sanity-dom test 20

sanity-dom/sanityn test 20 is failing at a high rate.  We
need to stop running sanity-dom/sanityn test 20 until we
understand why the test is failing and have a solution.
Thus, remove test 20 from the list of tests run by sanityn
when it is called by sanity-dom.

Test-Parameters: trivial mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testlist=sanity-dom env=ONLY=sanityn,ONLY_REPEAT=20
Signed-off-by: James Nunez <jnunez@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ic911c854930ab9b31fd4d1c2230cd9722782d320
